reviews.comment:
Hay siempre demora falta personale parece hacen lo q pueden con lo q hay .igualuy ables en la atension

(Translated by Google)
There are always delays, a lack of staff; it seems they do what they can with what they have. Likewise, the service is excellent.

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay mucha fila para cargar, eh demorado más de 1 hora en acargar combustible porque nunca ponen playeros suficientes para la cantidad de surtidores y de gente en horas pico de  verano

(Translated by Google)
There's always a long line to fill up; I've spent over an hour getting fuel because they never have enough attendants for the number of pumps and people during peak summer hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtaF91ZHl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Para destacar del lugar diría el servicio de agua caliente gratis. Por otro lado, los baños muy limpios. Sin embargo, pocos productos a la venta en el servicompras y, como en toda ypf, muuuuuy caro.

(Translated by Google)
A highlight of the place would be the free hot water service. On the other hand, the bathrooms are very clean. However, there are few products for sale at the grocery store, and, as with all YPF stores, they are very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtd2J1dXJBRRAB
